Subject: gifts
Message:
I called the company that makes the jewelry boxes to ask about their purses.
I think I have picked out one that I like, although it is difficult to see
them on the net.  They can add the ATM to any of them and this is the last
year they will be making them.  The purses look alot like Brighton, but are
alot cheaper.  The one I think I like is only $45.00.  We need to make the
order soon for the boxes.
